mapper.select:
SELECT s.*, p.spec, p.unit FROM inv_stock s LEFT JOIN biz_product p ON s.product_id = p.id
AND s.product_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{productCode}, '%')
AND s.product_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{productName}, '%')
AND s.warehouse_id = #{warehouseId}
AND s.quantity >= s.min_stock AND (s.max_stock IS NULL OR s.quantity <= s.max_stock)
AND s.quantity > 0 AND s.quantity < s.min_stock
AND s.quantity = 0
AND s.max_stock IS NOT NULL AND s.quantity > s.max_stock
ORDER BY s.created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM inv_stock WHERE quantity = 0 OR quantity < min_stock OR (max_stock IS NOT NULL AND quantity > max_stock) ORDER BY quantity ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE inv_stock SET quantity = #{quantity}, avg_cost = #{avgCost}, last_in_date = #{lastInDate}, last_out_date = #{lastOutDate}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
